choice: Surplus is implicitly consumed (not saved) unless the user enters an explicit taxable-contribution stream
rationale: Human-chosen during grooming (overrode recommendation: Invest the surplus into the TAXABLE bucket at the Plan's target allocation each step — symmetric to how deferrals land in tax-deferred (b5a77b58a) — and follow the same buy-and-hold/no-rebalance rule thereafter (returns reinvested in-asset). This makes accumulation automatic from income-vs-spending without a separate savings input, and matches how real households build taxable brokerage balances in their working years.)
